params_used.custom_text: // This module is designed to compute the difference between two 8-bit inputs, A and B, producing an 8-bit output C. It uses a clock input to synchronize operations. Upon each positive edge of the clock, it first calculates the difference of A and B and stores it in a delayed register (C_delayed). If both inputs remain unchanged compared to their previous clock cycle values, the module outputs the delayed difference; otherwise, it computes and outputs the difference of the current inputs directly.
